---
title: "Week06"
date: "2025-08-03"
#date-modified: "2025-07-29"
format: 
  html: default
image: "../img/strat.jpg"
categories:
  - "2025"
  - Stratocaster
  - Practice
  - TGIAY
  - Song
---

**Tempo: 70 bpm**

Economy of motion!

## Picking Practice

-   Alternate picking, fingers 4-2-3-1, from E to e string, 25 repetitions

-   Alternate picking, 2x each time, fingers 1-2-3-4, from E to e string, 25 repetitions

-   Alternate picking, fingers 1-3-2-4, from E to e string, 25 repetitions

## Chromatic Scale

Write and say it out loud:

[**C**]{.underline} C#Db [**D**]{.underline} D#Eb [**E**]{.underline} [**F**]{.underline} F#Gb [**G**]{.underline} G#Ab [**A**]{.underline} A#Bb [**B**]{.underline}

## Cmaj Scale

-   Play full Cmaj scale up & down in the first position, 1 min
-   Improvise over backing track

## Chord Practice

-   **Em** Chord, 25 repetitions

-   **Am** Chord, 25 repetitions

-   Chord progression, **Em → Am**, 3 min.

## Song Practice

Happy birthday.

## Video Log

{{< video https://youtu.be/J-h3cT97VkM >}}

## Fender Stratocaster

Pickup Position: Neck\
Master Volume: 3\
Master Tone: 5

## Zoom G3Xn

Preset: OFF

## Joyo Tremolo

Intensity: 25%\
Rate: 25%

## Fender Blues Jr. III

Volume: 8.0\
Fat: OFF\
Treble: 5.0\
Bass: 7.0\
Middle: 11.0\
Master: 4.0\
Reverb: 5.0

## Blue Yeti

Gain: 10 o'clock\
Mode: Stereo, on desk near plant

## Lesson Video

{{< video https://youtu.be/FLORjaPMUwI?si=z8RyNxM_drF57jU8 >}}
